name: iRhythm Holdings, Inc.
business: iRhythm is a leading digital healthcare company that creates trusted solutions that detect, predict, and prevent disease. Its principal business is the design, development, and commercialization of device-based technology to provide ambulatory cardiac monitoring services. It sells services primarily to physicians and healthcare providers, with revenue from third-party payors including Medicare and commercial insurers.

exposures.sentence: Our principal business is the design, development, and commercialization of device-based technology to provide ambulatory cardiac monitoring services.

Each iRhythm product offering combines a wire-free, patch-based, 14-day wearable biosensor ... with a proprietary cloud-based data analytic software ... to help physicians monitor patients and diagnose arrhythmias.
iRhythm is a leading digital healthcare company that creates trusted solutions that detect, predict, and prevent disease.
preliminary findings are generated by our proprietary FDA-cleared deep learning algorithms.
we have developed proprietary photoplethysmography ("PPG") algorithms designed to be integrated into a wearable device and utilized with our clinically integrated ZEUS System
We are subject to complex and evolving United States and foreign laws and regulations and other requirements regarding privacy, data protection, security, and other matters.

catalysts.event: Implementation of corporate holding company structure
catalysts.sentence: On January 12, 2026, iRhythm Technologies, Inc. implemented a corporate holding company structure whereby iRhythm Holdings, Inc. became the parent company of, and the successor issuer and registrant to, iRhythm Technologies
holders may convert their 2029 Notes at any time up through March 4, 2026, the thirty-fifth trading day after the effective date of the Holding Company Transaction.
These regulations took effect on February 2, 2026.

If the remaining milestone is to be achieved by its due date, and all required contractual conditions were completed by the end of 2026, we estimate that we would be obligated to pay up to an additional $2.4 million of contingent consideration.

tamClaims.claim: The ACM market is well-established in the United States with an estimated 6.9 million diagnostic tests performed in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The ACM market is well-established in the United States with an estimated 6.9 million diagnostic tests performed in 2025 with meaningful expansion anticipated in the coming years

tamClaims.claim: approximately 27 million individuals in the United States may be at elevated risk for undiagnosed arrhythmias
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that in 2025 approximately 27 million individuals in the United States may be at elevated risk for undiagnosed arrhythmias.

tamClaims.claim: approximately 10.6 million adults diagnosed with Afib in 2019 in the US
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, the prevalence of Afib is estimated to be approximately 4.5% of people, or approximately 10.6 million adults diagnosed with Afib in 2019
